norm_1.content: Everyone is not allowed to smoke indoors.
norm_1.subject: everyone

norm_2.content: Everyone should keep noise to a minimum.
norm_2.subject: everyone

norm_3.content: Everyone is expected to tip after meals.
norm_3.subject: everyone

norm_4.content: Everyone should respect others' personal space.
norm_4.subject: everyone

norm_5.content: Everyone is expected to clean up after themselves.
norm_5.subject: everyone
